label: MDP Simulator
info: Dashboard mo phong MDP Type A. POST {host}/api/inbound/{model} va GET {host}/api/outbound/{model}, header X-API-Key. Tick nhieu doi tuong de ap dung dong thoi. Moi attribute co Kieu + Sinh (Random/List/Tang dan), bam Cau hinh mo popup. GET hien du lieu o panel 'Du lieu GET gan nhat'. Persistent: settings.js contextStorage default localfilesystem roi restart. Mo /ui.
